zh-CN.name: 姑姑
zh-CN.intro: 姑姑是爸爸的姐妹，是小朋友的亲人。姑姑像妈妈一样温柔，会陪我们玩，给我们讲故事。

story.title: 姑姑的小惊喜
story.body: 星期天，姑姑来我家做客。她一进门就喊：小宝贝，姑姑来看你啦！我开心地跑过去，抱住姑姑。姑姑给我带了一个漂亮的布娃娃，我高兴极了。我们一起给布娃娃穿衣服、梳头发，姑姑还教我唱了一首新儿歌。中午，姑姑和我一起包饺子，我包了一个像小船的饺子，姑姑夸我真有创意。吃完饺子，姑姑带我去公园放风筝，风筝飞得好高好高，像一只快乐的小鸟。我拉着线跑来跑去，姑姑在旁边给我鼓掌。太阳快下山了，姑姑要回家了，我舍不得她，紧紧拉着她的手。姑姑蹲下来对我说：下个星期姑姑再来，我们一起去动物园，好不好？我点点头，和姑姑拉勾勾。姑姑真好，我真喜欢姑姑！

knowledge.title: 姑姑是谁？
knowledge.body: 姑姑是爸爸的姐妹，是爷爷奶奶的女儿。她像爸爸一样，是小朋友的亲人，会关心我们，和我们一起玩耍，分享快乐。姑姑可能住在另一个家，但会经常来看我们。

en.name: Aunt
en.intro: An aunt is the sister of your father. She is a family member who loves you just like Mom and Dad. Your aunt often brings you gifts and plays with you.

story.title: Aunt’s Little Surprise
story.body: On Sunday, my aunt came to visit. She called out, "Little sweetheart, your aunt is here to see you!" I ran over happily and hugged her. She brought me a pretty doll. I was so excited! We dressed the doll and combed its hair together. My aunt also taught me a new song. At noon, we made dumplings together. I made one that looked like a little boat. My aunt praised me for being creative. After eating, she took me to the park to fly a kite. The kite flew high in the sky, like a happy bird. I ran around holding the string, and my aunt clapped for me. When the sun was setting, my aunt had to go home. I didn't want her to leave and held her hand tightly. She crouched down and said, "I'll come again next week and take you to the zoo, okay?" I nodded, and we made a pinky promise. I love my aunt so much!

knowledge.title: Who is your aunt?
knowledge.body: Your aunt is your father's sister. She is a close family member. She cares about you and loves to spend time with you. She may live in a different house, but she often visits and brings joy.
